channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipping hotspot-, 11th May
item.description:
The photo posted of these bags have been here for a week now with no one around to pick them up. This is the flytipping hotspot- area- it's always takes weeks for the rubbish to be cleared - would advise getting a camera in this area to find out who is doing- most likely a flat on Kimberly road that has full bins. Foxes often come and rip up the bag leaving food strewn all over the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kimberley Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bin and trash outside 32 Brook Drive, 11th May
item.description:
Rubbish and waste piling up outside 32 Brook Drive. This is a health and safety hazard. Happens consistently. Something needs to be done

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32, Brook Drive, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter/fly tipping, 11th May
item.description:
A skip was placed on public land at the end of an alleyway a number of weeks ago. It is overflowing and rubbish has been placed at the side of the skip and down the alleyway behind it. There are no obvious signs of any building works taking place and residents in the adjacent houses do not know who is responsible for the skip. The rubbish is attracting foxes and vermin.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Thistlefield Close, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned, untaxed car with no MOT or insurance, 11th May
item.description:
Abandoned, untaxed car with no MOT or insurance . Reported numerous times to DVLA, the police and Bromley council.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pontefract Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes on Kimberly road, some around 4 inches deep, 11th May
item.description:
This pothole has been here since before September last year- no one has come to fix it

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kimberley Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Increased smoking hard drugs and becoming agressive in common area, 11th May
item.description:
There has been an increase in the number of people smoking drugs and becoming aggressive in the entrance. Over the last three days this has become a major problem.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Purcell Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car has been abandoned in a private car parking space., 11th May
item.description:
Been abandoned for over 2 weeks in a private car park and in a personal space (flat 7) Ive asked everyone in the building and no one knows whos it is. Its not anyone visiting the building.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Anerley Hill, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Trolley, 11th May
item.description:
Dumped trolley needs removing pls

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, Marion Crescent, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on a daily basis, 11th May
item.description:
Please install CCTV

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Timberwharf Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped drug/gas canisters, 11th May
item.description:
A box of huge gas canisters has been thrown to the side - aware that they are illegal

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kinnaird Avenue, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nr bike sheds/storage sheds, 11th May
item.description:
Lots of boxes etc so cannot access sheds
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southwark Park Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on William Barefoot, 11th May
item.description:
Flytipping by Altash Gardens bus stop

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): William Barefoot Drive, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed car dumped (again), 11th May
item.description:
Car is dumped in St Margaret's terrace This case is untaxed and wrongly classified as SORN Another dumped car by the garage. sadly our councillor who is the leader of RBG doesnt care

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Margarets Terrace, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left on pavement, 11th May
item.description:
Rubbish left on pavement by residents of 23 Clement Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clement Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree needs pruning, 11th May
item.description:
Tree needs pruning
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Villiers Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Western side of Kingsway outsideWestern side of Kingsway outside 65 Kingsway, the Soho Coffee Company, 11th May
item.description:
When standing in the traffic island in the middle of Kingsway looking wet towards the Soho coffee company the traffic light for pedestrians shows the red man effectively, but the green man is not visible because the slatted shutter in front of the green man signal is at the wrong angle. Not an immediate safety concern but needs rectifying.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 65, Kingsway, Holborn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This staircase is consistently used by people drinking - urinating and dumping rubbish, 11th May
item.description:
The council needs to proactively maintain this car park’s public areas, young children regularly use these stairs it’s unsightly not to mention a health hazard from the constant use as a public toilet.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burton's Yard, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Coping stone left on street, 11th May
item.description:
This has been dumped outside Sylvia Court for several months and I tripped over it. It is a hazard.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cavendish Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa blocking pavement, 11th May
item.description:
Sofa blocking pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chiltern Close, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked cars being an obstruction to the road, 11th May
item.description:
This spot has been used continuously by drivers, parking there cars in a position which constitutes an obstruction as you can see in the pictures. Everybody else park their cars in a parallel position while someone else parks in this wrongful position. It's not always the same driver but they are doing the same.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Broomhill Road, Goddington, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
